message:
fix(fcp-e2e): remove erroneous WIP feature gate from host resilience tests

The linter incorrectly added a cfg(feature) gate. These 73 tests compile
and pass without any feature flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -90,7 +90,6 @@ zapier = []
 redis = []
 postgresql = []
 whisper = []
-__host_resilience_wip = []
 
 [dependencies]
 fcp-core = { workspace = true }
